# Suggested GitHub Labels

Create these labels manually in the GitHub UI.

| Label | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `good first issue` | Small beginner-friendly contribution |
| `documentation` | README, support docs, or explanation improvements |
| `diagram` | Visual explanation or diagram work |
| `glossary` | Glossary term additions or edits |
| `translation` | Burmese/English wording or translation discussion |
| `terminology` | Consistency of technical terms |
| `technical correction` | Factual or technical fix |
| `chapter suggestion` | Chapter improvement proposal before manuscript changes |
| `roadmap` | Future work or planning item |
| `security` | Safety, secrets, guardrails, sandboxing, or automation risk |
| `help wanted` | Maintainer wants community help |
| `discussion` | Open-ended question or design discussion |
